quests.title: The Migration
objectives: Follow the Brachiosaurus herd migration path
Return to camp with location data

quests.title: Observe the Herd at Dawn
objectives: Reach the observation ridge before dawn
Observe the Brachiosaurus herd without alerting them
Count herd members and identify weak individuals
Return to Hunter NPC with report
quests.reward: Hunting knowledge +1, spear crafting recipe unlocked

quests.title: Prove Your Worth to the Tribe
objectives: Talk to the Elder at camp
Hunt a prey animal in the savanna (east 1500u)
Return to camp with proof of the kill
quests.reward: Tribe membership unlocked, access to crafting recipes from NPC_Craftsman_12
quests.emotional_arc: Outsider → Accepted member. Player must demonstrate competence before tribe trusts them with resources.
quests.design_note: First kill quest — teaches hunting mechanics. Prey animals are weaker than T-Rex but still dangerous. Player must use stealth or ambush from high ground.

quests.title: Defend the Camp
quests.trigger_condition: T-Rex crosses 800u guard perimeter (NPC_Guard_10/11 patrol zone)
objectives: Alert the tribe — reach camp center
Lead gatherers to treeline safety zone
Distract T-Rex away from camp (draw to zone 1200,-800)
quests.reward: Tribe survival rating +30, Elder respect unlocked, access to Q003 if not completed
quests.emotional_arc: Panic → Decisive action → Relief. Player must prioritize: save the vulnerable first, then confront the threat.
quests.design_note: Time-pressure quest. NPCs scatter via Agent #13 crowd system. Player must physically move to each objective zone. Failure = tribe casualties, permanent NPC loss.

quests.title: The Gathering
objectives: Gather berries from the eastern grove (500,-400)
Find flint stones near the rocky outcrops (-600,-500)
Fill water container at the river (300,800)
Return all resources to Gatherer NPC

hazards.water_zone: Crocodilian ambush possible at river bank

quests.reward: Food supply +50, crafting materials unlocked, NPC_Craftsman_12 recipe tier 2
quests.emotional_arc: Mundane task → Discovery of danger → Resourcefulness. Even gathering has survival stakes.
quests.design_note: Tutorial for resource gathering mechanics. Teaches players that every zone has environmental hazards. Links to crafting system (Agent #14 CraftingSystem).

quest_hub.lod_zone: CrowdLOD0 (500u radius) — all NPC interactions happen here

quest_givers_needing_dialogue.personality: Wise, measured, tests before trusting. Speaks in short declarative sentences. No mysticism — practical survival wisdom.
Direct, urgent, action-focused. Shouts during danger. Respects skill over status.
Practical, knows the land, warns of hazards. Speaks quietly — doesn't want to attract predators.

narrative_handoff.tone: Realistic prehistoric survival — no mysticism, no spiritual content. NPCs speak about food, danger, territory, and tribe survival.
